creator: Dom.Mitchell@palmerharvey.co.uk
text:
This updates nmap to 2.07.  There are no file additions/deletions.

Fix: Here's the patch.



This footnote also confirms that this email message has been swept by 
MIMEsweeper for the presence of computer viruses.
**********************************************************************--MSdDyHoHC9yuv39TWXbik5SAZs3MsP6SQixziLsD4p5daoOj
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urP /usr/ports/security/nmap/Makefile nmap/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/security/nmap/Makefile	Tue Feb  9 00:02:52 1999
+++ nmap/Makefile	Wed Feb 10 12:28:20 1999
@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 # ex:ts=8
 # Ports collection makefile for:  nmap
-# Version required:     	  1.51
+# Version required:     	  2.07
 # Date created:			  Tue Aug 04, 1998
 # Whom:				  David O'Brien (obrien@NUXI.com)
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.11 1999/02/08 18:56:36 obrien Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	nmap-2.06
+DISTNAME=	nmap-2.07
 CATEGORIES=	security net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.insecure.org/nmap/dist/  \
 		ftp://relay.nuxi.com/pub/misc/
diff -urP /usr/ports/security/nmap/files/md5 nmap/files/md5
--- /usr/ports/security/nmap/files/md5	Tue Feb  9 00:02:52 1999
+++ nmap/files/md5	Wed Feb 10 12:29:54 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (nmap-2.06.tgz) = bae2f437bbc9d024eaf1e0c371ed0a34
+MD5 (nmap-2.07.tgz) = 34263512d8599825db077b28609e44f6
-- 
**********************************************************************

intended solely for the use of the individual or entity to whom they   
are addressed. If you have received this email in error please notify 
the system manager.
How-To-Repeat: 
The usual.
